tools.name: mcp_init
tools.description: Initialize a session against an MCP server over the streamable-HTTP transport. Performs the spec handshake (initialize → notifications/initialized), captures any Mcp-Session-Id the server returns, persists the session under <workdir>/.cache/stado-mcp/<id>.json so subsequent calls can re-send the same auth headers + sticky session id. Pre-create the cache dir: `mkdir -p .cache/stado-mcp`.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"endpoint":{"type":"string","description":"Streamable-HTTP endpoint (e.g. https://api.example.com/mcp)."},"headers":{"type":"object","description":"Extra headers to send on every call (Authorization, X-API-Key, etc).","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["endpoint"]}

tools.name: mcp_list_tools
tools.description: List the tools exposed by an MCP server. Requires a session_id from mcp_init.

tools.name: mcp_call_tool
tools.description: Invoke a tool on an MCP server. Requires a session_id from mcp_init.
